creator: estartu@augusta.de
text:
Port for the new Stable Zope Release. New Port because upgrade from 2.10 isn't simple and
the zope 2.10 branch will get future releases.

Fix: 

The shar file is to large to be submited via webinterface and via send-pr it's bounced as spam. 

I have store the shar and a tar.bz2 file at 
http://etustar.ze.tum.de/zope211_port.shar and 
http://etustar.ze.tum.de/zope211_port.tar.bz2
